queryList.1: hp_master: SELECT id,city,show_module,show_filter,update_user_id,update_user_name,update_time,create_time,add_price_show_module,add_price_full_desc,add_price_discount_desc,red_packet_ids,home_view,home_view_times FROM activity_popup_red_packet_panda_league_config WHERE (city = '九江市') limit 1
queryList.2: hp_master: SELECT imoa.operate_area_id,imoa.city_name,imoa.area_name, s.fence_latlng FROM index_module_operate_area imoa LEFT JOIN hp_fence_template_sub s ON imoa.fence_template_id = s.template_id WHERE imoa.city_name = '九江市' and imoa.is_del = 0 AND imoa.is_use_index_module = 1
queryList.3: hp_master: SELECT index_module_id,module_name,is_auto_associate_city FROM index_module WHERE operate_area_id = 116 and language_code = 'CN'
queryList.4: hp_master: select g.id ,g.group_name ,g.start_date ,g.end_date ,g.day_limit ,g.city_type ,g.area_type ,g.user_label_type ,g.user_label ,g.sort ,g.group_status ,g.collect_type ,g.send_type ,g.send_period ,g.popup_status ,g.create_time ,g.create_user_id ,g.update_time ,g.update_user_id ,g.modify_user_name ,g.is_del ,g.selling_price from hp_save_money_coupon_group g inner join hp_city_link c on g.id = c.business_id and c.business_type = 3 and c.is_del = 0 where g.is_del=0 and g.group_status = 1 and c.city in ( '全部城市' , '九江市' )
queryList.5: hp_master: /*FORCE_MASTER*/ select user_id,user_name,user_password,user_pic,user_telphone,user_wx_openid,user_Invitation_code,user_code,user_ali_open_id, create_time,update_time,is_del,reg_ip,user_nick,role_id,user_status,user_salt,user_push_token,bs,audit_status,real_name, delivery_new_user_status,user_push_token,user_email,user_name_mask,user_telphone_mask,user_email_mask ,receiving_max,country,is_add_insure,is_add_zego,is_tip_show,country,run_type,is_can_take_order,is_auto_receive_order,is_special_driver,calling_code ,salary_rule_type,contract_status,star,user_wx_openid,user_ali_open_id,new_user_status,delivery_new_user_status,register_source,user_email from user where user_id=1398716814 and role_id=0 and is_del=0
queryList.6: hp_master: SELECT id , group_id , red_packet_id , city , unit_send_num , sort_num , create_time , update_time , is_del FROM hp_save_money_coupon_group_red_packet WHERE is_del = 0 AND group_id in ( 116 , 118 , 120 ) AND city in ( '全部城市' , '九江市' )
queryList.7: hp_master: SELECT id, max(collect_time) as collect_time, group_id, user_id FROM hp_save_money_coupon_group_collect_record WHERE is_del = 0 AND user_id = 1398716814 AND group_id in ( 116 , 118 , 120 ) GROUP BY group_id
queryList.8: hp_master: SELECT id , group_id , area_id , city , is_del , create_time FROM hp_save_money_coupon_group_area_relation WHERE is_del = 0 AND city = '九江市' AND group_id in ( 116 , 118 , 120 )
queryList.10: hp_master: select red_packet_id, red_packet_type_id, red_packet_name, red_packet_price, start_time, end_time, create_time, valid_days, threshold_price, valid_time_type, use_channel, is_opne_time_limit, opne_time_limit_string, is_tag_limit, discount_rate, discount_limit, send_count, send_number, count_number, country, city, crowd, scope, max_red_packet_price, min_threshold_price,min_discount_rate from red_packet where red_packet_id in ( 888893278 , 888893276 , 888893280 ) and is_del = 0 and `status` = 0 and (end_time=0 or end_time > 1748593756321) and (start_time=0 or start_time <= 1748593756321)
queryList.11: hp_master: select id, city, need_collect, red_packet_count, pf_red_packet_count, one_day_exposure, period_exposure_hour, create_time, update_time, create_user_id, update_user_id, is_del, modify_user_name, red_packet_index from activity_popup_red_packet_send_rule_config where (find_in_set('九江市', city) or city = '') and is_del = 0
queryList.12: hp_master: SELECT g.id, g.red_packet_group_name, g.start_date, g.end_date, g.city_type, g.city, g.effective_range, g.user_lable_type, g.user_lable, g.create_time, g.create_user_id, g.update_time, g.update_user_id, g.is_del, g.group_status,g.modify_user_name, g.language_code,g.group_type , r.red_packet_id, r.red_packet_type_id, r.red_packet_name, r.red_packet_name_en, r.red_packet_price, r.`start_time`, r.`end_time`, r.`status` as red_status, r.`city` as red_city, r.count_number, r.residue_number, r.valid_time_type, r.valid_days, r.shop_id, r.min_price, r.max_price, r.is_type_limit, r.`type_list`, r.threshold_price, r.`send_count`, r.`send_number`, r.use_channel, r.is_opne_time_limit, r.language_code redPacketLanguageCode, r.opne_time_limit_string, r.user_collect_num, r.discount_rate, r.discount_limit, r.`is_open`, r.is_popup, r.crowd, r.is_address_limit, r.is_tag_limit, r.min_threshold_price, r.max_red_packet_price, r.min_discount_rate, r.scope, r.activity_sn, rg.send_type, rg.send_period, rg.activity_id, rg.sort_num, rg.activity_popup_red_packet_group_id, rg.city as group_red_packet_city, rg.red_packet_platform FROM activity_popup_red_packet_group g LEFT OUTER JOIN activity_popup_red_packet_group_red_packet rg ON rg.`activity_popup_red_packet_group_id` = g.`id` inner join activity_popup_red_packet_group_red_packet_time rgt on rgt.group_red_packet_id = rg.id LEFT OUTER JOIN red_packet r ON r.`red_packet_id` = rg.`red_packet_id` WHERE g.`is_del` = 0 and rgt.is_del = 0 AND g.`group_status` = 1 AND ( g.city = '' OR FIND_IN_SET('九江市', g.`city`) >0 ) AND ('16:29' >= rgt.`start_time` AND '16:29' <= rgt.`end_time`) AND ('2025-05-30' >= g.`start_date` AND '2025-05-30' <= g.`end_date`) AND rg.`is_del` = 0 AND r.`is_del` = 0 AND (rg.`city` = '' OR rg.`city` = '九江市') AND (g.language_code = 'ALL' or g.language_code = 'CN') AND rg.red_packet_platform = 'HP'
queryList.13: hp_master: /*FORCE_MASTER*/ select user_id,user_name,user_password,user_pic,user_telphone,user_wx_openid,user_Invitation_code,user_code,user_ali_open_id, create_time,update_time,is_del,reg_ip,user_nick,role_id,user_status,user_salt,user_push_token,bs,audit_status,real_name, delivery_new_user_status,user_push_token,user_email,user_name_mask,user_telphone_mask,user_email_mask ,receiving_max,country,is_add_insure,is_add_zego,is_tip_show,country,run_type,is_can_take_order,is_auto_receive_order,is_special_driver,calling_code ,salary_rule_type,contract_status,star,user_wx_openid,user_ali_open_id,new_user_status,delivery_new_user_status,register_source,user_email from user where user_id=1398716814 and role_id=0 and is_del=0
queryList.14: hp_master: select count(1) from member_entity where user_id = 1398716814 and is_del = 0 and status = 1 and member_start_time < 1748593756358 and member_end_time > 1748593756358
queryList.15: hp_master: SELECT r.red_packet_id, r.red_packet_type_id, r.red_packet_name, r.red_packet_name_en, r.red_packet_price, r.`start_time`, r.`end_time`, r.`status` as red_status, r.`city` as red_city, r.count_number, r.residue_number, r.valid_time_type, r.valid_days, r.shop_id, r.min_price, r.max_price, r.is_type_limit, r.`type_list`, r.threshold_price, r.`send_count`, r.`send_number`, r.use_channel, r.is_opne_time_limit, r.language_code redPacketLanguageCode, r.opne_time_limit_string, r.user_collect_num, r.discount_rate, r.discount_limit, r.`is_open`, r.is_popup, r.crowd, r.is_address_limit, r.is_tag_limit, r.min_threshold_price, r.max_red_packet_price, r.min_discount_rate, r.activity_sn, r.scope FROM red_packet r WHERE r.`is_del` = 0 and r.red_packet_id in ( 888893276 , 888893278 , 888893280 )
queryList.16: hp_master: select id,activity_popup_red_packet_group_id,add_tag_id,gmt_create,gmt_update,is_del from activity_popup_red_packet_group_address where activity_popup_red_packet_group_id in ( 0 ) and is_del = 0
queryList.17: hp_master: select id, user_id, unique_token, platform, ip, activity_popup_red_packet_group_id, red_packet_id, collect_time, city, red_packet_platform from activity_popup_red_packet_group_red_packet_collect where user_id=1398716814 and activity_popup_red_packet_group_id in ( 0 ) and red_packet_id in ( 888893276 , 888893278 , 888893280 ) and (city = '九江市' or city = '') and red_packet_platform = 'HP'
queryList.18: hp_master: SELECT n.* FROM hp_user_collect_num n WHERE is_del = 0 and n.user_id = 1398716814 and n.red_packet_id in ( 888893276 , 888893278 , 888893280 )
queryList.19: hp_master: SELECT uccs.activity_sn, uccs.collect_source, uccs.gmt_created, uc.red_packet_id FROM user_cdkey uc, hp_user_cdkey_collect_source uccs WHERE uc.user_cdKey_id = uccs.user_cdkey_id AND user_id = 1398716814 AND uc.is_del = 0 AND uccs.collect_source in ( 29 , 14 ) AND uc.red_packet_id in ( 888893276 , 888893278 , 888893280 )
queryList.20: hp_master: select distinct red_packet_id from activity_popup_red_packet_group_red_packet_collect where user_id=1398716814 and collect_time >= 1748534400000 and red_packet_id in ( 888893276 , 888893278 , 888893280 )
queryList.21: hp_master: select u.user_cdKey_id, u.red_packet_code, u.create_time, u.lock_status, u.activity_sn, u.is_used, u.red_packet_id, u.red_packet_type_id, u.red_packet_name, u.type_name, u.red_packet_price, u.start_time, u.end_time, u.status, u.is_exchange, u.valid_days, u.create_time, u.create_time as cdKey_create_time, u.country, u.shop_id, u.discount_rate, u.discount_limit, u.delivery_bear_type, u.threshold_price, u.merchant_price, u.valid_time_type, u.use_channel, u.delivery_distance_lower_limit, u.delivery_distance_upper_limit, u.is_open_time_limit, u.open_time_limit_string, u.city, u.crowd, u.language_code, u.is_tag_limit, u.is_del, u.red_packet_scope_type, u.collect_source,u.tag_json_list from user_cdKey u where u.user_id=1398716814 and (u.is_del=0 or u.is_del=-1) and (u.city ='九江市' or u.city = '') and u.end_time >= 1748534400000 -- and (u.member_entity_id is null or u.member_entity_id = 0)
queryList.22: hp_master: select count(1) from member_entity where user_id = 1398716814 and is_del = 0 and status = 1 and member_start_time < 1748593756433 and member_end_time > 1748593756433
queryList.23: hp_master: SELECT hac.activity_sn FROM hp_activity_config hac WHERE hac.sts = 1 and hac.sub_state in (1,2) and hac.activity_sn in ( '1' )
queryList.24: hp_master: select red_packet_id,status,valid_days,shop_id,start_time,end_time,valid_time_type,shop_member_send_limit,threshold_price,discount_rate ,red_packet_name,red_packet_type_id,red_packet_price,country,city, show_in_pay_success,show_in_order_detail,ad_url,max_price,share_content,crowd,share_title,max_red_packet_price, min_threshold_price,min_discount_rate,`scope`,expand_tag_relation_type from red_packet where red_packet_id = 888893276 and is_del = 0
